data.title: Shakeology

seo.title: Shakeology Overview: Start Your Journey Here
seo.description: Make a change in your nutrition with Shakeology, get started with the formula, and meet the nutritionists behind it here.

trainers.bioBodi: The originator of the formulation philosophies behind many BODi supplements, including Shakeology. Isabelle is known for her no-compromise approach to quality.

Darin’s passion for potent, sustainable nutrition led him to team up with Isabelle Daikeler to create Shakeology. Known for traveling the world to source rare superfoods, BODi’s “ingredient hunter” uses his expertise to source powerful ingredients to use in Shakeology.

data.descriptionShort: Our powerful superfood nutrition shake. Requires a Free Team Beachbody account.
data.descriptionLong: Feel the difference when you feed your body the crucial nutrients found in Shakeology. Because when you feel better, you do better—at just about everything.
data.descriptionOverview: The original superfood shake that has helped millions feel amazing. Protein, pre & probiotics, antioxidants, adaptogens, greens, +more.

media.title: What Is So Special About Shakeology?
media.subtitle: 2m

modules.title: Explore Shakeology
modules.content: Shakeology is the original superfood shake – the highest quality most potent blend of protein, probiotics, digestive enzymes, antioxidants, adaptogens, phytonutrients, and more. It has helped millions of people feel amazing, improve digestion, experience healthy energy and weight loss. From decadent chocolate to creamy vanilla, we've got flavors to satisfy every mood and craving.

trainers.bio: The originator of the formulation philosophies behind many BODi supplements, including Shakeology. Isabelle is known for her no-compromise approach to quality.

Darin’s passion for potent, sustainable nutrition led him to team up with Isabelle Daikeler to create Shakeology. Known for traveling the world to source rare superfoods, BODi’s “ingredient hunter” uses his expertise to source powerful ingredients to use in Shakeology.

20bZmxUo4RlOz5ycc5yV46.title: Why I Still Drink Shakeology Every Day
20bZmxUo4RlOz5ycc5yV46.descriptionLong: Shakeology co-creator Darin Olien explains why he cares so much about what goes into Shakeology, and what doesn't.

trainers.bio: Darin’s passion for potent, sustainable nutrition led him to team up with Isabelle Daikeler to create Shakeology. Known for traveling the world to source rare superfoods, BODi’s “ingredient hunter” uses his expertise to source powerful ingredients to use in Shakeology.

A3jSdym3jf5hqTWanxQNBG.title: Ilana Muhlstein, MS, RDN, Talks About the Benefits of Shakeology & Shakeology Boosts
A3jSdym3jf5hqTWanxQNBG.descriptionLong: Ilana Muhlstein, MS, RDN and co-creator of 2B Mindset, breaks down the benefits of Shakeology and Shakeology Boosts and why having them daily can help support your overall health and wellness goals.

trainers.bio: Ilana Muhlstein holds a Master of Science degree in applied nutrition from Northeastern University and is a Registered Dietitian Nutritionist—the highest standard in the field of nutrition. She is also a mother of 3. She’s the creator of 2B Pregnant and the 2B Mindset eating plan, and author of the bestselling book You Can Drop It! She was an obese child who lost over 100 pounds using the principles that became 2B Mindset.
